---
pagetitle: "Fiction · Rabat Review of Books"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: fiction-listing
  contents: "posts/fiction/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description, categories, reading-time]
  image-height: "220px"
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ========== PRUSSIAN BLUE FICTION LISTING PAGE ========== */
body.quarto-listing-page,
.quarto-listing-page body,
main.content {
  background: transparent !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page {
  background: #1a2e42; /* Prussian blue — cool contrast to the cream of the story */
  color: #f3ead3;
  margin: -2rem -9999px 0 -9999px;
  padding: 5rem 9999px 6rem 9999px;
  min-height: 100vh;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .listing-page-title {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto 4rem auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .eyebrow {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.32em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #c69a3a;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page h1 {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5rem);
  line-height: 1;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  color: #f3ead3;
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .dek {
  font-family: 'Spectral', Georgia, serif;
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: #c7d4db;
  max-width: 38rem;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Style the Quarto listing cards to read on the blue */
.rrb-fiction-listing-page #fiction-listing {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .list .quarto-post {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(243, 234, 211, 0.18) !important;
  padding: 2.25rem 0 !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .list .quarto-post:last-child {
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(243, 234, 211, 0.18) !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post .thumbnail img {
  box-shadow: 0 20px 50px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post h3.listing-title,
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post h3.listing-title a {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  font-size: 2rem !important;
  line-height: 1.1 !important;
  color: #f3ead3 !important;
  text-transform: none !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post h3.listing-title a:hover {
  color: #c69a3a !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post .listing-subtitle,
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post .listing-description {
  font-family: 'Spectral', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-style: italic !important;
  color: #c7d4db !important;
  font-size: 1rem !important;
  line-height: 1.55 !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post .listing-author,
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post .listing-date,
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-post .listing-reading-time {
  color: rgba(243, 234, 211, 0.75) !important;
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  font-size: 0.8rem !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .quarto-category {
  background: rgba(198, 154, 58, 0.18) !important;
  color: #e6c587 !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(198, 154, 58, 0.4) !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .listing-actions-group .form-control,
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .listing-actions-group .btn {
  background: rgba(243, 234, 211, 0.08) !important;
  color: #f3ead3 !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(243, 234, 211, 0.25) !important;
}
.rrb-fiction-listing-page .listing-actions-group .form-control::placeholder {
  color: rgba(243, 234, 211, 0.5) !important;
}
</style>

<div class="rrb-fiction-listing-page">
<div class="listing-page-title">
  <div class="eyebrow">◆ Department ◆</div>
  <h1>Fiction</h1>
  <div class="dek">Short stories and novel excerpts — original fiction by contemporary writers.</div>
</div>
```

::: {#fiction-listing}
:::

```{=html}
</div>
```
